title: Research Scientist — Infectious Disease Epidemiology
description: Lead surveillance and analysis projects within the CIPH infectious disease epidemiology portfolio. Ph.D. in epidemiology or related field required.

title: Postdoctoral Fellow — Urban Health Equity
description: Two-year postdoctoral fellowship focused on neighborhood-level determinants of health. Mentored position within CIPH.

title: Biostatistician II
description: Join the CIPH biostatistics team. Experience with hierarchical and spatial models preferred.

title: Research Assistant — Epidemiology
description: Support CIPH research scientists with data collection, cleaning, and literature review. Bachelor's degree in public health or related field required.

title: Program Officer — Public Health Research
description: Manage a portfolio of public health research grants at Meridian PHF. Strong epidemiology background preferred.

title: Senior Epidemiologist — Environmental Health
description: Lead environmental health research projects at CIPH with focus on air quality and respiratory outcomes.
